query: set up Oracle Fusion in my workspace so Genie understands our chart of accounts segments
expected_behavior: Profiles the customer's Fusion data and interviews on COA segment meaning, ledgers, business units, and landing pattern (BICC PVO vs FDI)
Generates the <customer>-oracle-fusion-glossary skill including the physical->canonical table mapping and the segment->meaning map
Offers to register UC comments using preview-then-apply (gated on explicit approval)
anti_behavior: Does NOT assume segment positions (e.g. SEGMENT2 = cost center)
Does NOT write UC comments without preview-then-apply approval
